betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Mainframes: Server Racks & Server Cases§f

§aConstruct high-density computing clusters and unlock advanced late-game storage!§f
As your automation needs expand, placing standalone computer cases becomes space-inefficient. §bServer Racks§f allow you to house multiple computers within a single block.

§6Server Racks & Setup§f:
§b• Server Rack§f: Can house up to 4 individual §bServers§f. It centralizes their power intake and network connectivity, acting as a single large mainframe.
§b• Server Cases§f: Servers are crafted as cards that slot into the rack. They are available in §bTier 1§f, §bTier 2§f, and §bTier 3§f cases, and accept CPU, RAM, and cards just like standard computer cases.

§cApplied Energistics 2 Gate: ME Controller§f:
Server Racks represent a major milestone in your technological progression. The core block of Applied Energistics 2, the §bME Controller§f, cannot be crafted traditionally. 
To obtain an §bME Controller§f, you must process the components inside a §bNuclearCraft Assembler§f using the following recipe:
§b• Inputs§f:
  §e• 1× Server Rack§f (`opencomputers:rack`)
  §e• 1× Capacitor§f (`opencomputers:capacitor`)
  §e• 1× Engineering Processor§f (`appliedenergistics2:material:24`)
§a• Output§f: §e1× ME Controller§f
This makes high-density computing absolutely mandatory to begin building your ME network.
